subject: Re: crash during subtomo export
body:
Hi,

Your issue seems related to 
this: https://groups.google.com/g/warp-em/c/nqD-8-WQkTc/m/SSavkE3BAgAJ

Does it go away when you switch to using CPU in the sub-tomo export dialog, 
or increase the export pixel size?

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Tuesday, October 26, 2021 at 8:14:31 PM UTC+2 mrJ wrote:

> hi,
>
> exporting subtomo reconstructions and got the error below.   Thanks in 
> advance!
>
>
> System.Exception: System.Exception: cudaErrorMemoryAllocation
